metadata.description: PostToolUse hook for Claude Code. Applies rule-based output reduction to Bash, git, grep, find, ls, Read, and MCP tools — truncation, grouping, and comment stripping depending on the command.

plugins.name: gtk-ai
plugins.description: PostToolUse hook that applies rule-based filtering to Bash, grep, find, ls, git, Read, and MCP tool output before it reaches the agent.
